name: Fast Payday Loans, INC.
description_short: Miami payday lender offering up to $1,000 in same-day cash advances in as little as 30 minutes, regardless of credit history.
description_long:
Fast Payday Loans, Inc. is a brick-and-mortar payday lending operation with a store located on the first floor of the Altis apartments building at 2132 SW 8th Street in Miami, Florida. The company targets Miami-area residents who need immediate access to small amounts of cash and positions itself as a local, in-person alternative to online-only lenders.

The lender offers payday cash advances of up to $1,000. The process begins online with a request form, after which a store representative calls the applicant back to explain the loan terms and required documents. The borrower then visits the store in person to complete paperwork, undergo a quick evaluation for their qualifying amount, and receive their cash — all within approximately 30 minutes of arriving. Required documents include a government-issued ID (must be 18+), a most recent pay stub, and an active checking account in the applicant's name.

What distinguishes Fast Payday Loans, Inc. from fully online payday lenders is its in-person, consultative model. A representative walks each borrower through the process on a courtesy call before they visit the store, which can reduce confusion for first-time payday loan borrowers. The store is open Monday through Friday 9AM–6PM and Saturday 9AM–4PM, providing some weekend availability. The company explicitly advertises that credit history is not a barrier to qualifying.

Honestly, this is a single-location payday lender serving only Miami's SW 8th Street neighborhood. The website discloses no APR, fee schedule, or loan term information — a significant omission that makes it impossible to evaluate the true cost of borrowing. Payday loans as a product class typically carry APRs in the triple digits. The in-store-only completion requirement means there is no fully remote option. Borrowers should request full fee and term disclosures before signing anything.
pros: Cash available in as little as 30 minutes after arriving in store
Loans up to $1,000 with no credit history requirement
Online request form initiates process before the in-store visit
Representative callback explains process and answers questions before you commit
Physical storefront offers face-to-face assistance for first-time borrowers
Minimal document requirements: ID, one pay stub, and a checking account
cons: Single Miami location only — inaccessible to anyone outside the immediate area
In-store visit is mandatory to complete the loan; no fully online or remote option
APR, fees, and repayment terms are not disclosed anywhere on the website
Requires a pay stub — unemployed or gig workers without traditional pay documentation may not qualify
Closed Sundays, limiting access on true weekend emergencies
best_for: Miami residents near SW 8th Street who need up to $1,000 the same day
Borrowers with poor or no credit history who cannot access traditional credit
Employed individuals with a pay stub who need a short-term bridge to their next paycheck
First-time payday loan borrowers who prefer in-person guidance over an online-only process
diagnosis: Fast Payday Loans, Inc. is best for Miami-area residents with steady employment who need up to $1,000 in emergency cash the same day and cannot qualify for traditional credit. The main caveat is that this is a single physical location with no APR or fee disclosures on its website, so borrowers must ask for full cost terms before signing — payday loans routinely carry APRs exceeding 300%.
services: In-store loan processing and paperwork completion
Loan amount evaluation based on applicant documents
Walk-in store service with staff assistance
